title: scutellaria aurea
intro: Scutellaria aurea, also known as Golden Skullcap, is a perennial plant species in the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to China and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria aurea include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and irritable bowel syndrome. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
